DP.171.0000:
Hello, hello. Would you like to hear
a trendy saying?
DP.171.0001:
Very well...\f
The trendy thing to say for you
would be...\f
[011C,0000]!\f
That’s a trendy sort of thing
to say.
DP.171.0002:
Oh, come on now. With an attitude like
that, you’ll fall behind the times!
DP.171.0003:
I hope you’ll use trendy sayings
in a trendy way.
DP.171.0004:
Hello, hello. Are you using trendy
sayings?
